zh.lifeSummary: William Syckerling於1533年出生在英國英格蘭艾可波泰德。他於大約1552年與Mary在英國艾可結婚。他去世於1599年4月24日在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國艾可波泰德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Syckerling于1533年出生在英国英格兰艾可波泰德。他于大约1552年与Mary在英国艾可结婚。他去世于1599年4月24日在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在英国艾可波泰德。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: William Syckerling was born in 1533, in Boxted, Essex, England, United Kingdom. He married Mary about 1552, in Essex, England. He died on 24 April 1599, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Boxted, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: William Syckerling est né en 1533, à Boxted, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Mary environ 1552, à Essex, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 24 avril 1599, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Boxted, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: William Syckerling wurde 1533 in Boxted, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat um 1552 in Essex, England Mary geheiratet. Er starb am 24. April 1599 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Boxted, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: William Syckerling è nato il nel 1533 nel Boxted, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Mary circa 1552, nel Essex, England. Morì il 24 aprile 1599, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Boxted, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Syckerlingは1533年にイギリスイギリスエセックスボクステドで生まれた。約1552年にイギリスエセックスでMaryと結婚した。彼は1599年4月24日に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスボクステドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Syckerling(은)는 1533년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 보스테드에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1552년 영국 에세스에서 Mary(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1599년 4월 24일 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 보스테드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Syckerling nasceu em 1533, em Boxted, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Mary aproximadamente 1552, em Essex, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 24 de abril de 1599, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Boxted, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: William Syckerling родился в 1533 г. в местности бокстед, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary около 1552 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. Он умер 24 апреля 1599 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности бокстед, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: William Syckerling nació en 1533, en Boxted, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Mary aproximadamente 1552, en Essex, Inglaterra. Murió el 24 de abril de 1599, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Boxted, Essex, Inglaterra.
